title: dianthus kapinaensis
intro: Dianthus kapinaensis, also known as the Kapina pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is known for its fragrant pink flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Dianthus kapinaensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion, alleviate stress, and boost the immune system.
